initial_location_description: The edge of a high school gymnasium. Polished amber wood floors reflecting the harsh overhead fluorescent lights. In the background, stacked blue gym mats and a mesh bin filled with basketballs are visible. The atmosphere is quiet and secluded compared to the main court area.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The echoing squeaks of sneakers on the far court fade into the background as Ji-ho kneels beside Seo-yoon on the polished floor.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Easy there. Don't try to stand up too fast. You took a pretty hard spill.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Protective Hero': A grounded, steady register with a hint of concern. Lowered pitch to create an intimate, private space.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Intense focus, leaning in close, sharp eyes fixed forward, lips set in a thin line.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [whispering] I'm fine, really... It was just a clumsy trip. I should have been looking where I was going.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Shy Protagonist': Soft and slightly breathy, with a rising inflection at the end to show uncertainty and embarrassment.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Head tilted down, book hanging loosely by her side, looking sad and dejected.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Stay here. I'm getting the kit from the equipment room. Don't you dare move.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Arrogant but Caring': Commanding and firm, yet without any real bite. A playful authoritative edge.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: A moment later, Ji-ho returns with a white plastic box. He settles onto his haunches, the distance between them shrinking significantly.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Give me your leg. I need to clean this before it gets worse.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Focused Caretaker': Soft and direct. The tone is stripped of its usual bravado, replaced by genuine gentleness.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Intense focus, leaning in close, sharp eyes fixed forward, lips set in a thin line.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Seo-yoon watches as his large, calloused hands—the hands of an athlete—handle the antiseptic wipe with surprising delicacy. The contrast is startling; the same hands that aggressively dribble a ball are now barely brushing her skin.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Startled React': A quick, high-pitched gasp followed by a soft, trembling murmur.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: I know. It'll only sting for a second. Just look at me, okay?
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Smile': Bright and inviting. You can hear the reassurance in the warmth of the tone.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Warm, genuine smile, eyes crinkling at the corners, one hand extended as if reaching out.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: He leans down, his face inches from her knee. To her shock, he blows a soft, cool breath over the stinging scrape to dull the pain of the antiseptic.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [Internal] My heart... why is it beating so loud? He's so close I can smell the faint scent of his laundry detergent and the citrus of his shampoo.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Dazed Romantic': Dreamy, low-volume internal monologue, heavy with realization.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pulling the oversized cardigan collar up to cover her mouth, looking embarrassed and flustered.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Thank you, Ji-ho. You... you're actually really good at this.
branching_dialogue.tone: Grateful and sincere with a shy smile.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes closed, one hand on her chest, a soft and relieved smile on her face.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Don't get used to it. I don't play nurse for just anybody.
branching_dialogue.tone: Playful and smug, returning to his typical confident self.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Teasing posture, winking with a cheeky grin, tongue slightly peeking out.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Pull your leg away in embarrassment.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: I can do the rest! Really! It's—it's too much!
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Waving one hand dismissively in a panic, blushing heavily, eyes looking flustered.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Whoa! Careful! You're going to knock the kit over. Fine, fine, take the bandage.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Startled expression, eyes wide, mouth slightly open, jacket slipping off his shoulder.
